ksa_text: Ability to assess transparency requirements for AI systems and ensure outputs meet governance standards for interpretability, explainability, and regulatory compliance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Governance Professional (IAPP) scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("explainabil", "interpretabil", "transparency"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 4 job-posting-level and 0 certification-level matches (CRISC, CISM, FRM, NIST AI RMF, SR 11-7, IAPP). Competency appears regularly in RSK role descriptions and/or certification curricula.
